name: Berlin Central Station — Platform and Accessibility Upgrade
description: Modernisation of platforms 1–6, new lifts, tactile guidance, and fire compartment upgrades. Night works scheduled to limit passenger disruption.
costs: EUR 38.5 million (public tender, co-funded by federal transport programme)
initiator: Deutsche Bahn Infrastruktur AG (with Berlin Senate for Urban Development)

name: A23 Südosttangente — West Section Viaduct Renewal
description: Structural renewal of two viaduct sections, including bearing replacement, deck waterproofing, and noise barriers. Local lane reductions during off-peak windows.
address: A23 between Knoten Inzersdorf and Anschlussstelle Liesing, Vienna, Austria
area: Municipal border Liesing / Liesing industrial zone

name: Port of Maasvlakte II — Quay 7 Berth Strengthening
description: Deepening berthing pocket, quay wall reinforcement for heavier crane loads, and onshore power bollard preparation for two vessel classes.
costs: EUR 120 million (Port authority capex, phased milestones)
initiator: Havenbedrijf Rotterdam N.V. (Port of Rotterdam Authority)
